chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI High Court Appeal No.406 of 2022 Dated Order with signature of Judge Hearing case (priority) 1. For order on office objection/reply at A 2. For hearing of Main Case 3. For hearing of CMA No. 4059/2022 (stay) Dated 17.01.2024 None present for the Appellant Raja Muhammad Safeer Advocate for the Respondent No1.-.-.-.-.-. It is claimed that a suit for administration was decreed as compromise. As against a compromise decree an application under Section 12 C.P.C. was filed, which dismissed for non-prosecution, following by restoration application which was also dismissed, hence this appeal. Appellant’s counsel did not appear on the last date of hearing and even today he is called absent. Dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Amjad PS
